message:
feat(tests): add 3 property tests for apply_piped_stdin and normalize_cli, fix move errors

app.rs: 3 additional proptests for apply_piped_stdin (trim/prepend, noop) and
normalize_cli (provider lowercase, print semantics). Fixed prop_assert_eq move
errors by borrowing in comparison.

session_store_v2.rs: improved sidecar_path assertion clarity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
